project.name: Afiya Birthday Surprise
project.description: Interactive birthday surprise webpage for Afiya Mubassira (born June 13, 2005)

screens.description: Shows countdown to next birthday. Displays when it's not June 13.
elements: Preview button to test birthday screen

screens.description: Greeting screen with gift box. Displays on June 13 or via preview.
elements: Happy Birthday title with current age

screens.description: 100-card grid showing all birthday wishes. Cards unlock based on age.
elements: Sticky top bar with progress bar (X/100 Unlocked)
Unlocked cards (i <= age): colored gradient, icon, label, clickable
Locked cards (i > age): 🔒 icon, year label, opacity reduced

screens.description: Full unfolded wish card view with typewriter effect.
elements: Wish icon + name + age + wish message (typewriter animation)
Buttons: View Memories, Blow Candles, Share Card, Another Wish

screens.description: Interactive cake with 5 candles to blow out by clicking.
elements: 3-tier cake with frosting, sprinkles, gradient layers
Click candle → extinguish flame + smoke puff animation
When all out: confetti burst + fireworks + success message

screens.description: Photo slideshow of 7 images with lightbox.
elements: Gallery header with title + close button
Lightbox: prev/next/close, keyboard arrows, touch swipe

cards.unlockRule: i <= currentAge() — cards 0-20 unlocked at age 20, auto-increments each birthday
cards.unlockedDisplay: Colored gradient background, animated icon, clickable

i18n.scope: All UI text, countdown labels, wish content, button labels, settings panel

fireworks.trigger: Auto on birthday, manual button (bottom-left), on card open, on cake complete

balloonPop.type: 8 floating emoji balloons on birthday/card screens

typewriter.type: Character-by-character text reveal on wish message
typewriter.cursor: Random colored blinking cursor during animation

share.method: html2canvas CDN capture → Web Share API / download fallback

controlPanel.drawer: Slide-in from right with backdrop blur

navigation.screenStack: nh[] array — tracks screen history for back button
navigation.backButton: Overlay top-left ← Back button (hidden on countdown/birthday)

keyboard.Escape: Close control panel → Close lightbox → Go back
keyboard.ArrowLeft: Previous gallery photo or lightbox image
keyboard.ArrowRight: Next gallery photo or lightbox image

cardWishes.first21: Year-specific wishes (EN + BN) — one per year from birth to age 20
cardWishes.remaining79: Bonus positive affirmations (EN + BN) — strength, dreams, beauty, friendship, hope, adventure, growth, magic

assets.icons: 4 icon files (2 PNG, 2 SVG) in icons/ directory
